programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: And Frasier Makes Three: Frasier goes out to dinner with his attractive matchmaker Charlotte... and her boyfriend Frank.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Detour: Frasier and Charlotte are stranded in the middle of nowhere when Frasier's car suddenly breaks down. Niles plans Martin's stag party.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Crock Tales: Frasier considers throwing out an old pot, but it brings back memories, including the time he accidentally glued himself to an obnoxious blind date.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Goodnight Seattle (Part 1/2): With Charlotte (Laura Linney) about to leave for Chicago, Frasier is offered a job in San Francisco.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: After a car mounts the pavement, pedestrians with serious injuries are brought into A&E. Jodie's cut her leg on glass on a night out. And is 61-year-old Crispin having a stroke?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Harry has fallen off his scooter and badly cut his head. A 56-year-old has crashed his motorbike at speed and now his leg's at risk. And Mike hurt himself putting out the rubbish.

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The Drone Unit is airborne again hunting crime from above. Some kids have started fires on an allotment. And a burglar is tracked breaking into a rival drug gang's house. (Ep4)

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox, David Wilson and Dr Graham Hill re-open the confounding case of Robert Duff: a devoted dad from north London who vanished without a trace in January 2013.

programme.desc: Murphy's Historic Hotel: Gordon checks in to Murphys Historic Hotel in northern California, where the owners are distracted from business by the party going on in the rowdy bar.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody

programme.title: Night Coppers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine: Gordon's in Pennsylvania to help rescue a soul food restaurant that was opened 12 years ago by a retired special education teacher.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Recipe for Death II: Kiss the Cook: Adam asks Murray for money to film his own action movie, while Erica and Beverly go shopping for clothes.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Ho-ly K.I.T.T.: A shared love of the TV show Knight Rider brings Murray and his brother Marvin together. Beverly invites Lainey and Bill to Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: All Things Being Equal: Gloria, Claire, Haley, Alex, Lily, Luke and Manny each have very different ways of supporting gender equality.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alone Time: Everyone deserves a little alone time, but when Mitch and Jay separately seek out a much-needed retreat from the family, they end up at the same resort.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Barefoot Bob's: Gordon visits Barefoot Bob's beachside restaurant in Massachusetts, where husband and wife Marc and Lisa struggle to attract customers during the winter months.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon revisits Café Hon in Baltimore, Chiarella's in Philadelphia, and Leone's in New Jersey, to find out whether the owners have taken his advice on board.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Windbreaker City: The team are assigned the role of hostages at a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training exercise.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Wednesday Incident: When Peralta notices that Captain Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with Holt's husband Kevin to find out what's gone wrong.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Smart and Smarter: Lisa searches for a new identity when she worries that her position as the clever Simpson is under threat from Maggie.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner: The Simpsons find Marge's high school prom date Artie Ziff squatting in their loft, and he's planning to frame Homer...

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Kara-te Kid: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud for good.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Baré: When Lainey wins a scholarship to a top art college, Barry considers modifying his dream of becoming a doctor to go with her.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Tough Love: After leaving his real estate firm to strike out on his own, Phil decides that a solo camping trip in the wild is just what he needs to boost his confidence.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: He Said, She Shed: The homeowners association deny Claire's request to build a 'She Shed' in the garden, and only Luke and Phil know the real reason why.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Funeral: Another personnel change at the precinct puts Peralta and Santiago's budding relationship at risk. Meanwhile, Boyle is attracted to a fellow officer.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle's Hunch: Peralta thinks Boyle might have found his soul-mate in art gallery owner Genevieve. Diaz deals with a case of theft in the precinct building.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: You Only Move Twice: Homer is offered a new job by mysterious businessman Hank Scorpio. But will Marge, Bart and Lisa be happy in their idyllic new home town?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Homer They Fall: Homer becomes a boxer, thanks to his abnormally hard head. But is his skull strong enough for a fight against heavyweight champion Drederick Tatum?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brand new series - Bottle Episode: Homer must transport a million-dollar bottle of wine to Mr Burns's mansion. And for once, it's not actually him who screws it up.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Bob Next Door: Bart becomes convinced that his new neighbour Walt is really his vengeful arch-enemy Sideshow Bob (Kelsey Grammer) in disguise.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Relentless optimist Charlie has a heart-to-heart with emotional osteopath Benji. And will single mum Rachel be happy to roll with divorced toilet paper salesman Stephen?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time, Line of Duty, I Can See Your Voice, Beat the Chasers, Sex and the City, My Octopus Teacher, The Earth at Night in Color, and ITV News (PM's phone number).

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time, SAS: Who Dares Wins, Dragons' Den, Three Families, Headspace: Guide to Sleep, Secret Crush, Lego Masters USA, This Morning and BBC News (holidays).

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex...
programme.desc: ...Experiment: The retreat's first gay couple, Chris and Simon, want to explore if Simon is bisexual before they tie the knot. And will an orgy help Tom overcome his concerns?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Can Naked Attraction help clumsy Stephanie, who never gets a second date, and first-time lesbian Bethany find their perfect matches?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Relentless optimist Charlie has a heart-to-heart with emotional osteopath Benji. And will single mum Rachel be happy to roll with divorced toilet paper salesman Stephen?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time, Line of Duty, I Can See Your Voice, Beat the Chasers, Sex and the City, My Octopus Teacher, The Earth at Night in Color, and ITV News (PM's phone number).

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Can Naked Attraction help clumsy Stephanie, who never gets a second date, and first-time lesbian Bethany find their perfect matches?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry Goldberg's Day Off: Inspired by the film Ferris Bueller's Day Off, Barry pretends to be ill so he can avoid school and create an epic day of his own.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Happy Mom, Happy Life: Dana and Adam are given a doll to parent for a class assignment, but Beverly keeps interfering.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with Nessie: Calvin the over-enthusiastic groom plans a monster Scottish wedding at Loch Ness for him and his bride-to-be, Leanne.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Wine Weekend: The family go on a wine-tasting trip, and Gloria and Mitch are invited to a party at Oprah's house - but they can't bring anyone else.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Royal Visit: When Haley's astrophysicist boyfriend visits, Claire and Phil compete to prove who's smarter. Mitch and Cam go to a yoga retreat.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Barefoot Bob's: Gordon visits Barefoot Bob's beachside restaurant in Massachusetts, where husband and wife Marc and Lisa struggle to attract customers during the winter months.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon revisits Café Hon in Baltimore, Chiarella's in Philadelphia, and Leone's in New Jersey, to find out whether the owners have taken his advice on board.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Greatest Musical Ever Written: Barry makes fun of Adam for taking part in a school musical. Beverly's job as a substitute teacher causes problems for Erica.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Globetrotters: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry at basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the gym.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Lake Life: Jay makes the family take their holiday on a houseboat to create memories that will last long after he's gone. And Mitchell runs into an old flame.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Long Goodbye: Phil and Claire realise that Alex is more self-sufficient in college than they thought. Manny is determined to avoid a tearful goodbye when he moves to college.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Olde Hitching Post: Gordon visits the historic Olde Hitching Post restaurant in Massachusetts. Tom bought the business for his daughter but refuses to let her run it.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Levanti's: Gordon visits Pennsylvania, where he meets siblings whose inability to work together is risking their father's life savings at his Italian restaurant, Levanti's.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle-Linetti Wedding: The squad are all given tasks to complete for Gina's mum's wedding to Boyle's dad.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Peralta: Peralta's father, an airline pilot who hasn't played a big part in his life, comes to town. Holt sets the squad an impossible brain teaser.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Co-Dependent's Day: The Simpsons go to California so that Bart and Lisa can tell the Cosmic Wars creator what they think of his latest film.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Wandering Juvie: After Bart scams the town out of wedding presents, he is sent to juvenile detention. But he ends up on the run, chained to a female inmate.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A Night to Remember: Barry plans romantic gestures for Lainey on prom night, Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together and a nerdy girl asks Adam out.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Dynamic Duo: Barry tries to drive a wedge between Adam and Pops when they discuss a recently released Batman movie. Erica messes up her college interview.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Dear Beloved Family: Gloria rushes Phil to hospital for emergency surgery when he experiences intense stomach pains.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In Your Head: Luke goes missing after a night out. Can Manny, Phil and Gloria find him? Haley tries to land an interview with the creator of a big lifestyle website.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Oolong Slayer: Peralta enlists Captain Holt's help while investigating a serial killer. Diaz and Santiago are forced to deal with The Vulture's demands.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Halloween III: The third instalment of Peralta and Holt's 'Halloween heist' involves a tie-breaking contest to be crowned Amazing Detective Slash Genius.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Burns, Baby Burns: Homer concocts a scam with Mr Burns' long-lost illegitimate son Larry (guest star Rodney Dangerfield).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart After Dark: Bart gets a job at a burlesque theatre. Several residents are keen customers, but others aren't happy to have the showgirls peddling their wares in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brand new series - The Flandshees of Innersimpson: Flanders vows never to speak to Homer again after Homer steals his new headphones. Homer's absolutely delighted - at first...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Judge Me Tender: Moe becomes a judge on American Idol. Meanwhile, Homer spends more time at home, and drives Marge to distraction. Simon Cowell and Ellen DeGeneres guest star.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A retired champion car racer meets a champion ballroom dancer who's looking for a man 'with balls'. And sparks fly when Babestation model Rebecca meets leather-clad Mak.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: (2019) Sharp, eccentric murder-mystery starring Daniel Craig as a detective anonymously hired to investigate the death of a wealthy writer (Christopher Plummer). With Ana de Armas.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: (2022) Darkly-tinged but ultimately feel-good comedy starring Tom Hanks as a grumpy misanthrope who spends his time badgering people into following society's rules. But why is he like this?

programme.title: Our Kind of Traitor
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller about a British couple who get drawn into a Russian mafia conspiracy. With Ewan McGregor, Naomie Harris, Stellan Skarsgård and Damian Lewis. Based on John le Carré's novel.

programme.title: Night of the 12th
programme.desc: (2022) Award-winning, gritty true-crime drama following a faltering police investigation into the grisly murder of a young woman. With Bastien Bouillon and Bouli Lanners. In French/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Shepherd of the Hills
programme.desc: (1941) John Wayne stars as a moody young man living in the Ozarks who has sworn revenge on his long-absent father for deserting his mother. Then a kindly stranger appears on the scene...

programme.title: The Mouse That Roared
programme.desc: (1959) Satirical comedy starring Peter Sellers (in a triple role) and the original Doctor Who, William Hartnell. The world's smallest state, Grand Fenwick, declares war on the USA.

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: (1965) Western. James Stewart stars as a wealthy Virginia farming patriarch trying to keep his family together and safe in the midst of the encroaching American Civil War.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged planet Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Beau Is Afraid
programme.desc: (2023) Joaquin Phoenix stars in Ari Aster's fantastical odyssey about an anxiety-riddled man-boy working his way through a variety of psychological horrors to visit his domineering mother.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: (2009) Michael Mann directs Johnny Depp as infamous bank robber John Dillinger; Marion Cotillard as Dillinger's sorta girl; and Christian Bale as the FBI agent trying to put him away.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Local Hero
programme.desc: (1983) Comedy starring Peter Riegert, Burt Lancaster and Peter Capaldi. A US oil company executive tries to persuade a small Scottish seaside community to sell up their entire village.

programme.title: Hail the Conquering Hero
programme.desc: (1944) Satirical wartime comedy starring Eddie Bracken as a man who becomes a celebrated war hero despite having been medically discharged from the marines after only a few weeks.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: (1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.

programme.title: Moon
programme.desc: (2009) Psychological sci-fi thriller. Sam Rockwell stars as a man who lives alone on the moon overseeing a mining operation. His time's nearly done, but he's started to go a bit peculiar...

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: (2003) Action with Colin Farrell and Samuel L Jackson. A loose canon joins an elite force to escort a fugitive to chokey. But the baddie's put a reward out for help with his escape.

programme.title: xXx: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2005) Action thriller sequel with Samuel L Jackson, Ice Cube and Willem Dafoe. There's a new Triple X agent in town and he's up against some shady government business.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

programme.title: The Devil at 4 O'Clock
programme.desc: (1961) Drama. Spencer Tracy stars as an unfairly unpopular priest living on a volcanic South Sea island which is about to erupt. With Kerwin Matthews, Frank Sinatra and Barbara Luna.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: (2016) Taraji P. Henson, Octavia Spencer and Janelle Monáe star in the Oscar-nominated, fact-based drama about three women whose genius made a significant contribution to the space race.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: (2018) Rami Malek turns in an Oscar-winning performance as Freddie Mercury in this rollercoaster musical biopic of the late Queen frontman. Big tunes. Big drama. Bigger teeth.

programme.title: Benedetta
programme.desc: (2021) Paul Verhoeven's historical drama. Sex and the sacred collide as a Renaissance nun begins to have visions of Christ, while also taking a shine to one of her sisters. In French/subs.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: (2022) Darkly-tinged but ultimately feel-good comedy starring Tom Hanks as a grumpy misanthrope who spends his time badgering people into following society's rules. But why is he like this?

programme.title: Our Kind of Traitor
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller about a British couple who get drawn into a Russian mafia conspiracy. With Ewan McGregor, Naomie Harris, Stellan Skarsgård and Damian Lewis. Based on John le Carré's novel.

programme.title: Night of the 12th
programme.desc: (2022) Award-winning, gritty true-crime drama following a faltering police investigation into the grisly murder of a young woman. With Bastien Bouillon and Bouli Lanners. In French/subs.
